---
name: Bug report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behaviour
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Priority

- [ ] **P0 — Critical** (blocking use; data loss; crash)
- [ ] **P1 — High** (major feature broken; workaround exists)
- [ ] **P2 — Medium** (minor feature; cosmetic; edge case)
- [ ] **P3 — Low** (nice-to-fix; documentation)

## Environment

- **OS:** (e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04)
- **App version / commit:** (e.g. from `npm run tauri dev` or build)
- **Hardware:** (e.g. 8GB RAM, no GPU / NVIDIA GTX 1060)

## Steps to reproduce

1.
2.
3.

## Expected behaviour

(What should happen.)

## Actual behaviour

(What actually happens.)

## Additional context

(Logs, screenshots, sample image if relevant.)

## Checklist

- [ ] Not a duplicate of an existing issue
- [ ] Steps are reproducible
- [ ] Priority selected above
